历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20894 → 21213 → 20753 → 21621 → 25591, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2025, it dropped by about 3970 places compared to 2024, the largest single-year decline in the past five years, with a baseline ranking of about 25591. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category was 55 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 68 in 2024, 72 in 2025, and planned 84 in 2026, an increase of 12 students (+16.7%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push the ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 75th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 70–75 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In recent reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals have been observed; the overall Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with average exposure and stable application attention; the university is characterized by geology, resources, and environment, with profound disciplinary foundations in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The university offers these majors in Anhui, attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from approximately 462,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 313,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 461 points, slightly lower than 465 points in 2024, indicating a possible slight increase in exam difficulty. The university is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment; Anhui Province is not the local province of this university, so there is no local enrollment preference. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 2–3%, which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 25591 in 2025, the 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 pushing the ranking higher, the reduction of Physics Category candidates in Anhui by about 2.4% partially offsetting the expansion effect, the slight decrease in the provincial control line, and the stable university reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 27950, a further decline of about 2359 places compared to 2025; the range is 27450–28450.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (27450) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 27950) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (28450) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing characteristic majors like Geology and Exploration.
